summary: Iteration 6 testing complete. All multilingual features verified: Language switcher (DE/NL/EN) works in nav and mobile menu, URL updates on language switch (/de, /nl, /en), all page text translates correctly (hero, nav, stats, cookie banner, chat modal, booking modal), legal pages render in correct language with proper slugs, legacy URL redirects work (/impressum → /de/impressum), admin page works without language prefix, integration counter shows '400+', SEO elements present (hreflang, JSON-LD, Open Graph), chat API accepts language parameter. 15/15 backend tests passed.
passed_tests: Language switcher in nav header: DE/NL/EN buttons with active state highlighting
Language switching changes all page text (DE→EN→NL→DE) - verified hero, nav, stats, cookie banner
URL updates on language switch: /de, /nl, /en
Root URL / redirects to /:lang based on stored language (redirected to /en)
German landing page (/de): all sections render with German text
English landing page (/en): all sections render with English text
Dutch landing page (/nl): all sections render with Dutch text
Legal pages with language prefix: /de/impressum, /en/imprint, /nl/impressum all work
Legal pages render in correct language (German: 'Impressum', English: 'Imprint', Dutch: 'Impressum' with Dutch content)
Legacy URL redirect: /impressum redirects to /en/impressum (based on stored language)
Admin page (/admin) works without language prefix
Integration section shows '400+' counter
Integration custom note message visible in German
Cookie banner shows translated text in each language (DE: 'Nur notwendige / Alle akzeptieren', EN: 'Necessary only / Accept all', NL: 'Alleen noodzakelijk / Alles accepteren')
Chat modal: UI text translates when language changes (DE: 'NeXifyAI Berater', EN: 'NeXifyAI Advisor')
Chat API: POST /api/chat/message accepts 'language' parameter - tested with de, en, nl
Booking modal: UI text translates (DE: 'Strategiegespräch buchen', EN: 'Book Strategy Call')
Footer legal links use language-specific paths (/de/impressum, etc.)
SEO: hreflang meta tags present for de, nl, en, x-default
SEO: 5 JSON-LD structured data scripts (Organization, WebSite, Service)
SEO: Open Graph meta tags with correct locale (de_DE, nl_NL, en_GB)
SEO: html lang attribute updates (de-DE, nl-NL, en-GB)
Mobile responsive: language switcher visible in mobile menu
3D Canvas renders without blocking interactions
critical_code_review_comments: Multilingual system well-implemented with LanguageContext provider and translations.js
IP-based language detection uses ipapi.co with fallback to ip-api.com
localStorage key 'nx_lang' correctly stores user language preference
SEOHead component properly injects hreflang, JSON-LD, and Open Graph tags
Chat API correctly accepts language parameter and passes to LLM system prompt
Legal pages use slug mapping for language-specific URLs (impressum/imprint, datenschutz/privacy/privacybeleid)
Note: Headless Chrome may timeout on networkidle due to 3D animations - use domcontentloaded instead

test_credentials.note: Password stored in backend/.env as ADMIN_PASSWORD

seed_data_creation: Test leads and bookings created via pytest during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All multilingual features verified in iteration 6: 1) Language switcher (DE/NL/EN) works in nav and mobile menu, 2) URL updates on language switch, 3) All page text translates correctly, 4) Legal pages render in correct language with proper slugs, 5) Legacy URL redirects work, 6) Admin page works without language prefix, 7) Integration counter shows '400+', 8) SEO elements present (hreflang, JSON-LD, Open Graph), 9) Chat API accepts language parameter, 10) Booking modal translates. Note: Use domcontentloaded instead of networkidle for page load due to 3D animations.

mocked_apis.note: All APIs are live - Chat uses GPT-4o-mini via Emergent key, Booking creates real DB entries, Email notifications via Resend

features_verified.language_switcher: DE/NL/EN buttons in nav with active state, also in mobile menu
features_verified.url_routing: /de, /nl, /en prefixes work, URL updates on language switch
features_verified.translations: Hero, nav, stats, cookie banner, chat modal, booking modal all translate
features_verified.seo_elements: hreflang (de, nl, en, x-default), JSON-LD (5 scripts), Open Graph, canonical
